subject: Free farm finance resources for {{ contact.company }} members
previewText: Tax guides, courses, and live webinars your members can access right now — no subscription required.
intro_text:
Hi {{ contact.firstname|default("there") }},

I wanted to share one more thing before I step back: even outside of a formal partnership, we’d love to get Ambrook’s free educational resources in front of your members to support your work of making their operations more successful and resilient.

We produce educational content specifically for farm and ranch operations to get their financial operations in order, that your team can share in newsletters, at events, or on your website - and none of it requires a paid Ambrook subscription:

  • Tax deduction guides tailored to farm and ranch operations
  • Ambrook Education courses covering financial management fundamentals
  • Live Tax Office Hours webinars with ag finance professionals
secondary_text:
Associations like NCBA and Montana Farm Bureau have found these resources especially helpful to get organized for tax season, the upcoming busy season, and their long-term growth goals.

You can find those resources on our site here; members can either sign up for the 8-part course so that one topic is delivered to their inbox weekly, or access all content directly on their own time.
signature_text:
Either way, thanks for your time and your commitment to creating more resilient farmers and ranchers, communities, and food systems.

-Gabe
